Description: Assets for Evan, the pianist of The Indigo-Go's.
Assets for Wizrobe, its platforms, and its magical attacks.
Deku Baba and withered Deku Baba assets. Identical to OoT
Assets for the Shooting Gallery Men and the Swamp Guide. They all use the same body and just swap out the head.
Assets for Garos and the Garo Master
Assets for Skull Kid, including a small number of animations. Most animations are in object_stk2 and object_stk3.
Assets for the Eyegore enemy and associated props
Assets for Unused Hylian Young Woman NPC
Death Armos: flying statues in Inverted Stone Tower Temple
Object for Zora Baby and Zora Egg
Object for the choir frogs and unused hostile(?) frog
Original name is "csn_atsume" ("to collect; to assemble; to gather​")
Object for the Curisoity Shop Man
This is the object for the Postbox Prop
Assets for the King's Chamber Deku Guards
Assets for the guy looking up at the moon, and the guy you find in Spider Houses.
Assets for the warp portal, warp crystal, the boss warp platform, and related effects.
Assets for Wolfos and White Wolfos
[object_ds2] still exists as a copy from OoT in MM, but unused, this has a different skeleton with legs
Assest for the giant turtle and wave he creates
Assets for Unused Hylian Woman NPC with Red Top and Black Skirt
Assets for Tijo, the drummer of The Indigo-Go's.
This is the object for the Iron Knuckle Enemy
Assets for Barten, the Milk Bar Bartender
Assets for the Goht boss fight (Goht itself, its title card, its lightning, its rocks, etc.)
Original name is "ah_deteike" (probably based on her Japanese dialogue, where she tells Kafei to "get out")

Assets for Igos du Ikana and his aides.
        A note about the original animation names; in MM3D, they split them up into two into two nearly-identical but
        incompatible sets of animations. For example, there is an animation named "nsk_king_front_damage" for the king,
        and an animation named "nsk_zako_front_damage" for the aides. In the original game, the animations are used
        for *both* the king and his aides, so for the animation names, I just removed "king" or "zako" from the name
        under the assumption that Grezzo were probably the ones who added the qualifier to the names.

Assets for Igos du Ikana and his aides.
        A note about the original animation names; in MM3D, they split them up into two into two nearly-identical but
        incompatible sets of animations. For example, there is an animation named "nsk_king_front_damage" for the king,
        and an animation named "nsk_zako_front_damage" for the aides. In the original game, the animations are used
        for *both* the king and his aides, so for the animation names, I just removed "king" or "zako" from the name
        under the assumption that Grezzo were probably the ones who added the qualifier to the names.
Assets for the Gekko, Minislime, and Bigslime
Assets for Bio Deku Baba. The "Head" in this file refers to both the chomping head attached to the lily pad as well as
Assets for the Twinmold boss fight (Twinmold itself, the props in its arena, its title card, etc.)
The only used animation for Twinmold's Head
Assets for red and blue Bubbles
Assets for Anju in a wedding dress
Original name is "Bji_fushigigaru" ("to be curious; to wonder; to marvel​")
Assets for Deku Scrubs and their flowers
Assets for Poe Balloon archery target in Romani Ranch.
Object for the mannequin inside Anju's room which holds her wedding dress
Assets for both Wallmasters and Floormasters.
Assets for Gerudo wearing red, i.e. Aveil
Assets for dogs and the arrow that appears over your selected dog in the Doggy Racetrack
Assets for the Odolwa boss fight (Odolwa itself, its bugs and moths, its title card, etc.)
Assets for Mamamu Yan, the proprietor of the Doggy Racetrack.
Assets for Wart and its Bubbles
Assets for the Carnivorous Lily Pad
Assets for Snappers. There are two variants: the regular Snapper with four legs, and a Spiked Snapper with spikes instead of legs that spins to attack.
Original name is "Ani_guratsuku" ("to be unsteady; to reel; to shake​")
Object for MoonChild and his four Masks
Assets for Cremia's Donkeys and Gorman Brothers' Horses
Child Zelda: from the cutscene where Deku Link recalls how to play Song of Time after getting his Ocarina back
Assets for the composer brothers Flat and Sharp
Po Sisters (Jo, Beth, Ami, and Meg) that you fight as a minigame in Ikana for a HP
Cucco: zelda name for chicken, "Niw" likely short for "Niwatori"
Assets for the Ghosts, more-commonly known as the aliens
Object for the Pamela's father, both human and gibdo form
Assets for Hiploops. Includes an entire unused duplicate of the Hiploop's skeletal model and textures.

Gyorg, his title card, the small fishes he summons, the seaweed in his boss arena,
        and the bubbles in his intro cutscene. Also contains an unused copy of Majora's Wrath's
        whip assets, along with an unused duplicate of the small fishes.
Most of Skull Kid's animations, as well as assets for his curse effects and the Ocarina in the Clock Tower.
Grog: the Cucco keeper, you raise his Cucco chicks into adults to earn the Bunny Hood mask
object for the assets for ovl_En_Ge2 (Purple-clad Gerudo)
Assets for the bearded man from OOT, body is reused in MM for Cured Swamp Spider House Man (head substituted from overlay data).
